reasoning: The control SI-4(3) focuses on system monitoring through automated tools and mechanisms. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to several areas: audit logging captures and monitors API server interactions, admission controllers can enforce security policies and monitor compliance, service mesh solutions like Istio can provide observability and monitoring of service-to-service communications, and NetworkPolicies can be monitored to ensure they are effectively controlling traffic. These functions collectively support automated monitoring and integration within a Kubernetes environment.
title: System Monitoring - System monitoring | automated tool and mechanism integration employ automated to
